name: Tijuana Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of Mushroom soup (or Chicken)
1 pound ground meat, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, chilies, and soup in a saucepan; heat until warm.
2. Layer chips, meat, bean mixture, and cheese in the prepared dish.
3. Heat in a 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) oven until the cheese melts.
